purpose: Capture near-term jumps in security-fragmentation pressure as a construct-oriented predictive target.
positive_when: the next month or one of the next three months reaches the security-fragmentation-jump proxy threshold
the threshold is driven by fragmenting or high-severity episodes linked to security fragmentation, optionally reinforced by conflict, organized crime, shock, or external-economic stress
exclusions: this target is not a generic violence count target
it should capture jumps in fragmentation pressure rather than all broad contestation
next_workflow_steps: review proxy positives country by country
derive a stricter benchmark subset later if useful
